recipe.title: Beyond Burgers & Conecuh Sausage Dogs
ingredients: Burger buns, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles
1 lb Conecuh sausage, hot dog buns
steps: Cook on grill or skillet 3–4 min per side
Grill or pan-fry sausages until browned and heated through
Serve on toasted buns with fixings
Bake at 425°F for 18–22 min, turning halfway
Season with salt + pepper (or garlic powder)
